normalization.:relation_oid: installation-local pg_class OID excluded from equality

queries.sql: SET client_encoding TO 'UTF8'
SHOW client_encoding
SELECT n.nspname FROM pg_proc p JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = p.pronamespace WHERE proname = 'postgis_version'
SHOW search_path
SELECT version()
SET standard_conforming_strings = ON
SELECT oid, typname FROM pg_type WHERE typname IN ('geometry', 'geography') AND typtype = 'b'
SELECT postgis_version()
SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name = 'geometry_columns' LIMIT 1
SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name = 'spatial_ref_sys' LIMIT 1
SELECT ST_Srid('POINT EMPTY'::GEOMETRY)
SELECT current_schema()
SELECT c.oid FROM pg_class c JOIN pg_namespace n ON c.relnamespace = n.oid WHERE c.relname = ':table_name' AND n.nspname = ':schema_name'

SELECT a.attname, a.attnum, t.typname, t.typname = ANY(ARRAY['int2','int4','int8','serial','bigserial']) AS isfid FROM pg_attribute a JOIN pg_type t ON t.oid = a.atttypid JOIN pg_index i ON i.indrelid = a.attrelid WHERE a.attnum > 0 AND a.attrelid = :relation_oid AND i.indisprimary = 't' AND t.typname !~ '^geom' AND a.attnum = ANY(i.indkey) ORDER BY a.attnum

SELECT a.attname, t.typname, a.attlen, format_type(a.atttypid, a.atttypmod), a.attnotnull, def.def, i.indisunique, descr.description, a.attgenerated FROM pg_attribute a JOIN pg_type t ON t.oid = a.atttypid LEFT JOIN (SELECT adrelid, adnum, pg_get_expr(adbin, adrelid) AS def FROM pg_attrdef) def ON def.adrelid = a.attrelid AND def.adnum = a.attnum LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT indrelid, indkey, indisunique FROM pg_index WHERE indisunique) i ON i.indrelid = a.attrelid AND i.indkey[0] = a.attnum AND i.indkey[1] IS NULL LEFT JOIN pg_description descr ON descr.objoid = a.attrelid AND descr.classoid = 'pg_class'::regclass::oid AND descr.objsubid = a.attnum WHERE a.attnum > 0 AND a.attrelid = :relation_oid ORDER BY a.attnum
SELECT type, coord_dimension, srid FROM geometry_columns WHERE f_table_name = ':table_name' AND f_geometry_column = ':geometry_column' AND f_table_schema = ':schema_name'
SELECT c.oid FROM pg_class c JOIN pg_namespace n ON c.relnamespace = n.oid WHERE c.relname = 'metadata' AND n.nspname = 'ogr_system_tables'

SELECT d.description FROM pg_class c JOIN pg_namespace n ON c.relnamespace = n.oid JOIN pg_description d ON d.objoid = c.oid AND d.classoid = 'pg_class'::regclass::oid AND d.objsubid = 0 WHERE c.relname = ':table_name' AND n.nspname = ':schema_name' AND c.relkind IN ('r', 'v')
SELECT count(*) FROM "trace_points"
SELECT ST_Extent("geom") FROM "trace_points" AS ogrpgextent
SELECT srtext, auth_name, auth_srid FROM spatial_ref_sys WHERE srid = :srid
